title: Fairy Tale Elements (beanstalk, magic carpet, dig-stick)
description: Various items found in fairy tales.. giant beanstalk, magic carpet, dig-stick, hit-stick..
body:
Adds various items found in fairy tales:
 
- magic stick that wraps the castle (or something else..) into an apple, thenafter to be rebuilt out of it ( "Golden Stick" ~ 'aranyvessző' ) ( Use it on three blocks that mark the extents of the building )
- a meal-giving magic tablecloth ( "Magic Tablecloth" ~ 'Terülj-terülj asztalkám' ) ( Put it on a surface, then open it )
- magic sticks to dig ( "Digit-Digit-Little-Stick" ) or fight ( "Hitit-Hitit-Little-Stick" ~ 'Üssed üssed botocskám' ) ( These should be aimed on blocks (sideways or down), or on an enemy )
- the Giant Beanstalk to reach the villages in the sky
- Multi-usable Magic Carpet.. To hide something below, to hide something behind, to travel far and fast, to create a temporary foundation for a high-placed building.. or to help dressing on the beach (note: multiple carpets are needed for the last possibility)

_Based on various fairy tales and 'A Tutorial Mod made by Kaupenjoe'._
